name: CI Runs page + agent CI tab + Export Wizard reach Preview
description: T13 (SPEC-05): deterministic, LLM-free smoke over the export-to-CI feature against the T8 seed (no live GitHub/LLM round-trip). (1) /ci-runs renders the page header, the 9-column grid's headers, and the seeded ci_runs rows (varied statuses: succeeded/failed/running). (2) Opens the seeded 'Security Reviewer' agent (installed to 2 repos by the seed) and switches to its CI tab, asserting the exported state — 'CI deployment' heading, the 'Active in 2 repos' badge, the 'Fail CI on' control, and both installation rows including the drift ('Update available') one. (3) Opens the Export Wizard from the CI tab, fills the required repo field, advances Target → Preview, and asserts the Preview file tree lists the full committed set (manifest, both linked skills, the empty memory.jsonl, the bundled runner, and the generated workflow) — AC-2/4/5. NOTE (per e2e/INSIGHTS.md): several assertions use the CSS-rendered casing, not the source string casing — the CI Runs table's column headers are `text-transform: uppercase` (TIMESTAMP/PULL REQUEST/AGENT/SOURCE/DURATION/FINDINGS/COST/STATUS), while every other assertion here (page/section headings, badges, file paths under the `.mono` class) is untransformed and matched verbatim. No empty-state (AC-37) assertion: this flow runs against the one seeded stack the harness brings up, and exercising the true empty state would need a second, unseeded DB — out of scope for a single deterministic flow (skipped per the T13 plan's explicit fallback).

steps.label: load the CI Runs page
ci-runs route reached
the ci-runs fetch (+ mount reconcile) settles
page header renders
Timestamp column header (rendered uppercase via CSS text-transform; agent-browser matches the rendered glyphs)
Pull request column header (rendered uppercase)
Agent column header (rendered uppercase)
Source column header (rendered uppercase)
Duration column header (rendered uppercase)
Findings column header (rendered uppercase)
Cost column header (rendered uppercase)
Status column header (rendered uppercase)

cmd: Migrate sessions table to UUID primary key
steps.label: seeded CI run row (PR #479, succeeded) renders
a Succeeded status badge renders (status token, not the CRITICAL count — AC-33)
a Failed status badge renders (seeded PR #471 — missing artifact)
a Running status badge renders (seeded PR #465 — in progress)
the seeded runs' owning agent renders in the Agent column
load the agents list
agents route reached
agents fetch settles
filter the list to the single target card (client-side): brings it into view without a scroll, mirroring 08-skill-stats.flow.json's fix for the same nested-overflow-container click race
open the seeded Security Reviewer agent (--exact avoids a substring match landing under other chrome, per e2e/INSIGHTS.md's next-start click-point gotcha)
client-side navigation to the agent editor route lands
the agent editor mounts and its fetch settles
the editor tab bar renders (default Config tab)
switch to the CI tab
ci tab is active in the URL
the CI installations fetch settles
exported-state heading renders (agent has installations)
installation-count badge renders (the seed installs Security Reviewer to 2 repos)
the Fail-CI-on segmented control renders
current installation row (workflow v3, config in sync)
drift installation row
the drift row's update-available indicator renders (seed's deliberately stale installedConfigHash)
open the Export Wizard from the CI tab
the wizard modal opens on the Target step
the non-GHA targets render disabled ('coming soon' — AC-1), confirming the Target step's content
fill the target repo field (required to enable Continue)
advance from Target to Preview
the Preview step's file-tree pane renders
the preview bundle fetch settles
the agent manifest file is listed (AC-2)
the first linked skill file is listed
the second linked skill file is listed
the empty memory.jsonl file is listed (AC-5)
the bundled agent-runner file is listed (AC-4)
the generated workflow file is listed
